eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Somerset, MD; at 05:44 AM ON FEB 23, 2026 Effective until 06:44 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Due to the extended power outages, local fire departments are serving as warming centers. If transportation is needed contact 410 651 0707. Time for restoration and repair is unknown.
